title: jasminum rehderianum
intro: Jasminum rehderianum, also known as the Rehder's jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Oleaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to China, known for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
